title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Reliance Digital

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Reliance Digital
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Reliance Digital in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Digital:
Reliance Digital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
